name: Purity Ring
description: '''Purity Ring''' is a Canadian [[electronic pop]] duo from [[Edmonton]], Alberta, formed in 2010. It consists of multi-instrumentalist/producer Corin Roddick and vocalist Megan James. They released their debut album, ''[[Shrines (Purity Ring album)|Shrines]]'', in 2012, to critical acclaim, followed by ''[[Another Eternity]]'' in 2015, ''[[Womb (album)|Womb]]'' in 2020, and ''[[Purity Ring (album)|Purity Ring]]'' in 2025.
